creator: alp@rsu.ru
text:
Yes, confirm this.
PostgreSQL with dtrace enabled compiles and works on 9-STABLE

 > uname -a
FreeBSD pyhalov.cc.rsu.ru 9.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 9.2-PRERELEASE #0 
r255200: Wed Sep  4 19:36:12 MSK 2013 
root@*:/usr/obj/usr/src/9-stable/sys/MyKern  amd64




On 09/04/2013 04:12, Mark Johnston wrote:
> This almost certainly been fixed with r247221.
>
> I saw similar crashes when building perl with DTrace enabled, and I've
> seen other reports of DTrace crashing during the postgres build. I can't
> reproduce them on -CURRENT anymore. See
> http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-dtrace/2013-July/000033.html
>
> Thanks,
> -Mark
>


-- 
Best regards,
Alexander Pyhalov,
system administrator of Computer Center of Southern Federal University
